title: ctenopteris gordonii
intro: Ctenopteris gordonii, also known as the Gordon's fern or New Zealand tree fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. Traditionally, this plant has been used in Māori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ctenopteris gordonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Ctenopteris gordonii are often used to make teas, infusions, or salves, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
